summary: Completed backend + frontend regression on reliability-update scope using public preview URL. Backend proxy endpoints are healthy, frontend still loads, markets render correctly, command-center UI remains stable, positions/open-order sync UI renders without breakage, and deployment readiness report file exists/readable.
action_items: Run one manual real-wallet pass (Phantom/MetaMask) to validate live authorize + live open-order lifecycle transitions, which are not automatable in this environment.
critical_code_review_comments: Reliability patch intent is reflected in code: fetchServerTime now accepts numeric/raw values and open-order sync preserves cached orders on transient failures with lastOpenOrdersError tracking.
No blocking regressions found in tested flows (markets render, detail panel interaction, positions tab, sync button behavior, history navigation, backend proxy health).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated against frontend/.env public URL: https://quick-fix-71.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest passed 7/7 for /api/, /api/ping, /api/gamma/markets, /api/clob/time, /api/polygon, unknown service 404, and OPTIONS preflight. Frontend checks: market rows loaded (.mkt-item count 100), detail panel loads after market click, positions tab renders with open-orders sync button clickable, history view renders, no on-page error selectors found.
rca of the issue: No app regression issue reproduced in this scope. Initial failed UI attempt was due to stale test selectors (status-banner/testid mismatch and wrong market row class), not product behavior.
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this testing run
